private.title: 🏆 Quoto
private.body: I pick a quote of the day in group chats. Add me to a group and open /start there.
private.language_note: In private chat I follow your Telegram language.

group.title: 🏆 Quoto
group.admin_body: I watch the chat and publish the best line at the end of the day. Stats and settings below.
group.user_body: I watch the chat and publish the best line at the end of the day.

language.title: Group language
language.hint: Choose the language I speak in this group.

menu.group_context_required: Open this in a group chat.

private.title: Settings
private.language_hint: Keep your Telegram language or choose one manually.

group.title: Group settings
group.language_auto_updated: I'll detect the language myself at the next review.

context.label: Quote context
context.title: What context means
context.explain: Context is the set of messages AI chose around the winning phrase. If there are more than five, I trim the block around the quote itself.

quote_day.title: Quote of the day
quote_day.hint: When to wrap up the day and how many messages are needed for review.

publication.title: Publishing
publication.hint: How I format the result in the group.

time.title: Quote time
time.hint: At this time I close the day and choose the quote.

min_messages.title: Minimum messages
min_messages.hint: With fewer messages the day is skipped without review.

tz.title: Timezone
tz.hint: I compute the day's window and cutoff in this timezone.

chat_member.added: 🏆 Quoto Glad to be in {chat_title}. Every day at {time} I pick the brightest line and publish the quote of the day. Open /start — stats and settings are there.
chat_member.need_admin: ⚠️ Make me an administrator with permission to pin messages — then I can publish the result.
chat_member.admin_granted: Thanks! Now I can publish the quote of the day.

private.hello: 🏆 Quoto I pick a quote of the day in group chats: I collect the day's messages and publish the best line at the scheduled time. Add me to a group and open /start there.

start.group: 🏆 Quoto — Quote of the Day I collect the day's messages and choose the best line at the end of the day. Open /start to open the control panel.

stats.missing: Stats are not available yet — this group is not registered.
stats.empty: This chat has no published quotes yet.
stats.title: Chat stats

user_stats.empty: {user}, you have no published quotes in this chat yet. Keep writing — your time will come.
user_stats.title: Your stats

quote_post.context_truncated: ℹ️ Counted the last {shown} of {total} messages — context trimmed due to volume.

boring.title: 😴 No quote of the day today
boring.body: I didn't find a line worth the day. See you tomorrow!

agreement.title: 📄 Quoto — User Agreement & Privacy
agreement.summary: By using Quoto in this group you accept the terms below. Tap to expand.
agreement.body: 1. What Quoto does. During the day I read messages sent in this group and, at the set time, publish one “quote of the day”. 2. What is processed. Message text and captions, reactions, media (photos, videos, voice, audio), the author's name and Telegram ID, and the group's ID and title. 3. AI processing. To choose a quote, message text and media are sent to our AI provider OpenRouter and its model providers for analysis. Don't share passwords or sensitive data in chats where Quoto is active. 4. Storage. A day's messages are deleted after that day is processed. Published quotes and basic identifiers (user, group) are kept so statistics work. 5. Your data. I don't sell your data. To request deletion, contact @amti_yo. 6. Admin responsibility. By accepting, a group admin confirms they may add this bot and that members know the chat is processed by Quoto. 7. As-is. The service is provided “as is”, without warranties, and the terms may change; continued use means acceptance.
agreement.doc_footer: To enable the quote of the day, a group admin taps “Accept”. Questions: @amti_yo.
agreement.welcome_note: Before I publish anything, a group admin needs to accept the user agreement.
agreement.accepted_admin_hint: Now make me an administrator with the right to pin messages, so I can publish the quote of the day.
agreement.already: ✅ This group has already accepted the agreement.
agreement.admin_only: Only a group admin can accept the agreement.
agreement.reminder: 📄 To publish the quote of the day, a group admin needs to accept the Quoto user agreement.
